claim_text: Pocahontas was the daughter of the paramount chief of Wahunsenacah.
gold_evidence: Pocahontas was the daughter of Powhatan , the paramount chief of a network of tributary tribal nations in the Tsenacommacah , encompassing the Tidewater region of Virginia .
